join.title: Join Whiteboard
join.description: Enter your name to join the whiteboard session. Other participants will see this name.

notFound.title: Whiteboard Not Found
notFound.message: This whiteboard doesn't exist or is no longer available.

serverError.title: Something Went Wrong
serverError.message: We couldn't load this whiteboard. Please try again.

footer.guestContributionsWarning: Anyone with the link can edit

settings.title: Preview Settings
settings.subtitle: Choose how the whiteboard thumbnail looks in cards and previews

AUTO.title: Auto
AUTO.description: Automatically capture the full canvas view

FIXED.title: Fixed
FIXED.description: Lock to a specific area of the canvas
